root.name: Lv4 Rokn
速刷鹏鲲
root.description: 便宜好用，技能3级就行，只建议做速刷任务

branch.fit: [Rokh] [low] Magnetic Field Stabilizer II Magnetic Field Stabilizer II Magnetic Field Stabilizer II Magnetic Field Stabilizer II [med] Large Shield Extender II Large Shield Extender II Large Shield Extender II Multispectrum Shield Hardener II Multispectrum Shield Hardener II Tracking Computer II , Optimal Range Script == F-12 Enduring Tracking Computer Large Micro Jump Drive [high] 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun 425mm Prototype Gauss Gun [rig] Large Core Defense Field Extender I Large Core Defense Field Extender I Large Core Defense Field Extender I [cargo] Federation Navy Antimatter Charge L x2000 Federation Navy Uranium Charge L x2000 Federation Navy Thorium Charge L x2000
